contextBlurb: South Dakota has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 2 are already enacted. 2 relate to moratoriums or prohibitions. 1 offers incentives or exemptions.

legislation.title: Protect residents from increased utility costs and utility shortages caused by data centers and clarify authority to regulate data centers.
legislation.summary: Protect residents from increased utility costs and utility shortages caused by data centers and clarify authority to regulate data centers.

legislation.title: Place requirements on the use of artificial intelligence systems by health carriers in making determinations about the provision of health care services.
legislation.summary: Place requirements on the use of artificial intelligence systems by health carriers in making determinations about the provision of health care services.

legislation.title: Limit costs and risks associated with electricity use by data centers and impose a moratorium.
legislation.summary: Limit costs and risks associated with electricity use by data centers and impose a moratorium.

legislation.title: Protect residents from increased utility costs and utility shortages caused by data centers, to clarify authority to regulate data centers, and to modify provisions pertaining to the purchasing of goods and services by a data center.
legislation.summary: Protect residents from increased utility costs and utility shortages caused by data centers, to clarify authority to regulate data centers, and to modify provisions pertaining to the purchasing of goods and services by a data center.

legislation.title: Modify provisions pertaining to the purchasing of goods and services related to data center operations.
legislation.summary: Modify provisions pertaining to the purchasing of goods and services related to data center operations.

legislation.title: Provide a sales and use tax exemption for goods and services related to data center operations.
legislation.summary: Provide a sales and use tax exemption for goods and services related to data center operations.

legislation.title: Allow the Public Utilities Commission to assess actual costs to data centers that are customers of public utilities.
legislation.summary: Allow the Public Utilities Commission to assess actual costs to data centers that are customers of public utilities.

legislation.title: Restrict the use of artificial intelligence in therapy and psychotherapy services and to provide a penalty therefor.
legislation.summary: Restrict the use of artificial intelligence in therapy and psychotherapy services and to provide a penalty therefor.

legislation.title: Regulate the use of chatbots by minors.
legislation.summary: Regulate the use of chatbots by minors.

legislation.title: Limit nuisances caused by data centers.
legislation.summary: Limit nuisances caused by data centers.

legislation.title: Impose a one-year moratorium on the construction or expansion of hyperscale data centers.
legislation.summary: Impose a one-year moratorium on the construction or expansion of hyperscale data centers.

legislation.title: Create a taskforce to study the impact of artificial intelligence systems on the state.
legislation.summary: Create a taskforce to study the impact of artificial intelligence systems on the state.
